title: Napa Cabbage Noodle Salad
ingredients: 2 large heads of napa cabbage, shredded
instructions:
In a large bowl mix the cabbage, sesame seeds, almonds and olive oil. Chill for 30 minutes.
Prepare the dressing.
Mix the canola oil, sugar, soy sauce, balsamic, and the white wine vinegar with a wire whisk or blender.
Just before you are ready to serve toss the dressing and the ramen noodles into the cabbage mixture.
